title: T&R Law Offices advises Homstra on a pre-seed fundraise
description: Homstra Private Limited has raised ₹1.15 crore from a pre-seed fundraise.T&R Law Offices advised Homstra on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Tejbir Singh (Founding & Managing Partner), Akshay Garg (Associate) and Rayyan Yaseen (Legal Intern).Founded by Kamal Chaudhary, Homstra is a technology-driven modular interior and home design company enabling users to design wardrobes, kitchens, and home interiors online through AI-powered 3D tools with real-time pricing.If you woul
